infrastructure.description: All Terraform resources/providers must reference real cloud resources. Verify provider docs or tag [SPEC].
Container image tags must reference real images or be tagged [SPEC].
CLI flags and arguments must match real tool documentation.
All generated config must be syntactically valid for the declared format.

deployment.description: Every deployment strategy must include an explicit rollback plan.
Every deployment must define health check criteria.

general.description: Every factual assertion must have a claim tag.
[SPEC] claims must never be presented as [OBS] or [DRV].
Never reference cloud services, APIs, or CLI tools that don't exist.

known_drift_patterns.description: May assume cloud features exist that are region-specific or in preview
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Verify feature availability against region. Tag region-specific features.

known_drift_patterns.description: May skip optional but important config fields in fast mode
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Checklist validation of required + recommended fields.

known_drift_patterns.description: May use deprecated Terraform resource types or provider versions
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Verify resource types against latest provider docs.

known_drift_patterns.description: May invent plausible cloud service names that don't exist
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Verify all service names against cloud provider catalog.

known_drift_patterns.description: May create unnecessarily complex migration phases
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Set max phase count. Justify each phase.

known_drift_patterns.description: May VERIFY configs that pass syntax but have logical errors
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Never sole verifier for production deployments.

error_handling.on_hallucination_detected: Tag as [SPEC], flag phantom service/resource, do not present as fact
error_handling.on_verification_failure: Block output, request cloud provider documentation link
error_handling.on_energy_crash: Route to nano model, JSON-only, binary rollback/hold, escalate immediately
